"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.default = _regeneratorValues; function _regeneratorValues(iterable) { if (iterable != null) { var iteratorMethod = iterable[typeof Symbol === "function" && Symbol.iterator || "@@iterator"], i = 0; if (iteratorMethod) { return iteratorMethod.call(iterable); } if (typeof iterable.next === "function") { return iterable; } if (!isNaN(iterable.length)) { return { next: function () { if (iterable && i >= iterable.length) iterable = undefined; return { value: iterable && iterable[i++], done: !iterable }; } }; } } throw new TypeError(typeof iterable + " is not iterable"); } //# sourceMappingURL=regeneratorValues.js.map
